name: New Harvest Church
style: large single-story worship hall with pale vertical metal siding and a deep continuous dark fascia

notes: Long, nearly blank wall clad in pale beige-gray vertical metal panels.
Dark blue-gray fascia runs continuously across the top of the elevation.
Raised brown word signage is mounted high on the wall.
No doors are visible on this elevation.
The parcel contains nine buildings, but the assigned image region cleanly covers this signed wall and the large footprint geometry is consistent with the visible worship hall.
The roof surface is hidden by the fascia and should not be inferred as flat.
The foreground ornamental fence is not part of the building.
